description: The homeland where Lu Xun was born and spent his youth, including his former residence, Sanwei Study, and Baicao Garden.
A comprehensive scenic area integrating Keyan Rock Scenery, Jianhu Lake Scenery, and the cultural charm of Luzhen.
A private garden from the Song Dynasty, the site of the love story between Lu You and Tang Wan, where Yue Opera performances can be enjoyed.
A comprehensive museum showcasing the history, culture, and local characteristics of Shaoxing.

An ancient bridge from the Song Dynasty, a transportation hub during the Southern Song period, surrounded by the original ecological water town scenery, making it an excellent place to experience the old Shaoxing lifestyle.
The world's largest natural bonsai landscape, where visitors can take a traditional black-awning boat into caves to view cliffside stone carvings.
The birthplace of educator Cai Yuanpei, offering insights into the life, achievements, and ideological contributions of this modern education reform pioneer.

attraction_name: Night Cruise on the Ring River
description: Take a traditional black-awning boat to tour the Shaoxing Ring City River and experience the nighttime charm of the water town.
A traditional garden park in the urban area of Shaoxing, with a tranquil environment suitable for morning exercise and leisure.
